description: Supplement to norah_s2_inf_only_A (N_game=4, t=-3.00, confirmed real divergence). Same setup: WIP 1500 infantry-only attacks minxxx 50/50/50 + Norah S2=1. Target N=8 additional game runs to reduce SEM and confirm or refute the -0.61% bias (sim underpredicts attacker survivors by ~9 troops). If captured stats match norah_s2_inf_only_A (inf 209.9/202.2/118.1/131.2 etc.), pool results with the original testcase. If stats differ, commit as an independent testcase and note the stat change.
